bibl.title: Puruṣārtharatnākara
bibl.note: In 15 taraṅgas (NCC vol. 12, pg. 136a). The work deals with 15 subjects which either directly or indirectly relate to Advaita Vedānta: 1) purāṇaprāmāṇyavivekaḥ, 2) trivargatattvavivekaḥ, 3) mokṣatattvavivekaḥ, 4) caturvargasādhanavivekaḥ, 5) varṇāśramadharmāṇāṃ bhagavadārādhanarūpatvavivekaḥ, 6) varṇādidharmavivekaḥ, 7) bhagavadārādhanaviśeṣavivekaḥ, 8) nāmakīrtanādivivekaḥ, 9) bhagavadārādhanopapattivivekaḥ, 10) adhikārivivekaḥ, 11) tattvapadārthavivekaḥ, 12) vivekajñānaviṣayaikātmyavivekaḥ, 13) yogabahiraṅgavivekaḥ, 14) sayamaviṣayaphalavivekaḥ, 15) muktagativivekaḥ (Adyar vol. 9, ms. 933)
